title: pentacalia zamorana
intro: Pentacalia zamorana, also known as Zamorano pentacalia, is a flowering plant species within the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The leaves and stems of Pentacalia zamorana contain flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tincture or ointment.
